11.name: DEMO - Seed Patch Demo Packages
11.description: Downgrade host-specific packages so DEMO patch shows per-node pending updates. Idempotent; stdout includes DEMO_PATCH_SEED portal markers.

12.name: DEMO - Patch RHEL Servers
12.description: Apply package updates to RHEL web servers. Job stdout and the portal package-summary template show per-node package names. Survey options: security-only patching, optional reboot, and optional pre-seed of demo updates.

13.name: DEMO - OpenSCAP Scan
13.description: Run CIS OpenSCAP compliance scan on RHEL web servers and generate HTML/XML reports.

14.name: DEMO - OpenSCAP Remediate
14.description: Remediate auto-fixable CIS controls using a demo tailored profile; stdout shows full CIS baseline (~97%) and demo profile before/after scores (target 100%).

15.name: DEMO - Deploy Web Application
15.description: Deploy Apache httpd with environment-specific content on RHEL web servers. Job stdout and the portal deploy-summary template show per-node packages, stage, services, URL, and content.

16.name: DEMO - Verify Web Application
16.description: Verify deployed web applications return HTTP 200 with expected content. Job stdout and the portal verify-summary template show per-node URL, HTTP status, stage, and content snippet.

51.name: DEMO - Deploy App on OpenShift
51.description: Deploy the demo web application on OpenShift in a survey-selected namespace. Uses Tekton when Pipelines is installed, otherwise nginx static HTML. Emits DEMO_OCP_DEPLOY_PORTAL markers for the portal.

17.name: DEMO - RHEL Operations Pipeline
17.description: End-to-end RHEL operations pipeline: seed patch demo packages, patch, OpenSCAP scan, remediate, deploy web app, and verify.
